ValidationRule.description: Validation rule for RFP WTPs. Only when the Field Type is under 'Pure RFP', the status can be moved to Pure RFP.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'RFP_RFI_Questionnaire', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,'RFP')), ISPICKVAL( Status, 'Pure RFP stage'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Status is usedd for the Pure RFP type only.
